name: mandrel
description: AI Development Intelligence System - Persistent context management

scripts.hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath hooks && echo 'git hooks enabled (core.hooksPath=hooks): pre-commit secret scan active'
scripts.setup: npm run install:mcp && npm run install:command
scripts.test: npm run test:mcp && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:frontend: cd mandrel-command/frontend && CI=true npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false
